title: Slimes + (More Slimes Variants) X Fresh Animations
description: The Texture Pack that Makes slimes better by adding more Variants! (Works with Fresh Animations)
body:
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8043b36d1cf2366e766724c078771de9e4e943a4.png)

🟢**Slimes** + – 48 Slime Variants (Resource Pack for Minecraft 1.21)

Slimes+ is a vanilla-style resource pack that adds 48 random slime variants to Minecraft 1.21. Every slime you meet can look different — no behavior changes, just visual variety that keeps things fun and squishy.

🔹 Features:
🎨 48 unique slime textures, applied randomly

🧠 No mods or custom entities required — fully vanilla-compatible

🔄 Slimes still behave and spawn like normal

🤝 Compatible with Fresh Animations and other visual packs (This requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or Requires 2 Mods : [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/versions))

📦 Plug-and-play: just drop it in your resource packs folder

Bring some color and surprise to your slime encounters — simple, clean, and satisfying.

**ALSO ON** **[CruseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/slimes-more-slimes-for-1-21-x-fresh-animations)**
